Captain Shark (キャプテンシャーク) is a Brave robot from The Brave of Gold Goldran TV series. Known as the Pirate Battleship (海賊戦船 - Kaizoku Senkan) of the Legendra Braves, he can combine with Advenger in order to enter Hyper Galactica Buster Mode. He is the only Brave that has a master different than the main trio, this time being Walter Walzac.

His appearance is similar to a pirate, so you could say he's a pirate-bot. Captain Shark's alternate modes are a battleship and a battle tank, both designed after a shark. His paint job is mostly blue, with the yellow and red accents. He has a broad chestplate which is shaped like a shark head, which is a part of his alt mode. His optics are green.
creator: t0w3r
